name: research-context
description: Provide the user's research directions, domain keywords, related fields, and background as shared context for research skills.

interface.longDescription: Maintain the user's current research directions and domain context so paper reading, surveys, and idea discovery can make grounded transfer suggestions.
defaultPrompt: 查看我当前的研究方向
更新我的研究方向和关键词
添加一个新的研究方向
